sourcePrompt: An AC-47 "Spooky" gunship, a Douglas C-47 transport turned side-firing gunship, about twenty meters long with a wingspan wider still, sitting tail-down on taildragger gear. A rounded nose and stepped cockpit lead a fat cigar fuselage; two radial engines with propellers hang on broad low wings; a tall rounded tail fin rises aft. Three minigun muzzles poke from windows along the left fuselage side. Olive-drab over a dark underbelly, vintage and ominous.
handEdit: PropHub disc added at blade plane (blades read as separate in inspector); offline rebake from edited code.js, no model call
